name: 04_wrong_ats_name
description: The recruiter entered the wrong candidate name in the ATS ('Rohit Sharma'), the real candidate is Deepak. Name and self-intro signals fail entirely; behavior + Q/A structure + interviewer elimination must identify him.

data.text: Hi, thanks for making the time today. Could you introduce yourself and tell me about your recent work?

Hi Ananya, I'm Deepak. I've been doing frontend for around four years, mostly React and TypeScript. In my current role I own the design system, and I built the theming layer that supports our white-label clients.
Can you explain how you approach performance budgets on a large single page app?

I start from user-centric metrics. My team was responsible for getting LCP under two seconds, so I implemented route level code splitting, moved analytics off the main thread, and set up bundle size checks in CI that fail the build past budget.
Let's do a quick exercise. Can you share your screen and build a small component with me?
Sure, screen is up. I'll scaffold it with a controlled input first and then add the debounced search behaviour.
